ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the post (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "in_reply_to_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user the post is in reply to */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the post is a retweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was retweeted */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was favorited or liked */,
  "id_str" TEXT /* Unique string identifier for the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the post was made */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result of the post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (images, videos) attached to the post */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score based on likes, retweets, and replies */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or profile description */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the reply is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reply was created */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the reply was favorited or liked */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result of the reply */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (images, videos) attached to the reply */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score based on likes and retweets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the retweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the retweet was created */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result of the retweeted post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (images, videos) attached to the retweeted post */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score based on likes and replies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the like */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the like was created */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result of the liked post */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score based on other interactions with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the interaction is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., reply, retweet, like) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction was created */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result of the interaction */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score based on the interaction type and other interactions with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
